    end

def count_components(n : Int64, edges : Array(Array(Int64)), t : Int64) : Int64
  parent = (0...n).to_a
  rank = (0...n).to_a

  def find(u : Int64)

def solve(n : Int64, edges : Array(Array(Int64)), k : Int64) : Int64
  edges.sort! { |a, b| a[2] <=> b[2] }

  max_time = edges.empty? ? 0 : edges[-1][2]

  low = 0
  high = max_time
  answer = max_time

  def count_components(t)
    parent = (0...n).to_a
    rank = (0...n).to_a

    def find(u)
      if parent[u] != u
        parent[u] = find(parent[u])
      end
      parent[u]
    end

    def union(u, v)
      root_u = find(u)
      root_v = find(v)
      return if root_u == root_v

      if rank[root_u] > rank[root_v]
        parent[root_v] = root_u
      else
        parent[root_u] = root_v
        if rank[root_u] == rank[root_v]
          rank[root_v] += 1
        end
      end
    end

    edges.each do |edge|
      u, v, time = edge
      if time > t
        union(u, v)
      end
    end

    roots = Set.new
    (0...n).each do |i|
      roots.add(find(i))
    end
    roots.size
  end

  while low <= high
    mid = (low + high).div(2)
    count = count_components(mid)
    if count >= k
      answer = mid
      high = mid - 1
    else
      low = mid + 1
    end
  end

  answer
end

    root_u = find(u)
    root_v = find(v)
    return if root_u == root_v

    if rank[root_u] > rank[root_v]
      parent[root_v] = root_u
    else
      parent[root_u] = root_v
      if rank[root_u] == rank[root_v]
        rank[root_v] += 1
      end
    end
  end

  edges.each do |u, v, time|
    if time > t
      union(u, v)
    end
  end

  roots = Set.new
  (0...n).each do |i|
    roots.add(find(i))
  end
  roots.size
end
